title: 10 Herbal Tinctures For Dry Nose
description: Thymus vulgaris tinctures contains thymol and carvacrol, which are its active constituents. Thymol has antimicrobial properties that help reduce inflammation in the nasal passages, making it easier to breathe. Carvacrol, on the other hand, has a decongestant effect, which helps relieve congestion and dryness in the nose. Thymus vulgaris tinctures also contains eucalyptol, which helps thin out mucus and promote drainage, further relieving dryness and congestion. By addressing these issu...
